candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component only, not the total.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Non-current component, not total current assets.
Balancing line, not a reported current assets total.
Cash flow investing line, not balance sheet current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit balance-sheet total for current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Cash flow closing cash ties to balance-sheet cash, but balance-sheet line is preferred for CHE.
Cash flow opening cash is prior-period cash, not the balance-sheet line to use for CHE.
Operating cash flow, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash balance, which is preferred over cash-flow opening/closing lines.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Component only, not the total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Cash flow change line, not balance-sheet stock of liabilities.
Best balance-sheet measure of short-term debt/current interest-bearing borrowings; appears to exclude leases because lease liabilities are shown separately.
Captures current maturities of long-term debt but may miss any separate short-term borrowings.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the STD shortlist because it is the cleanest reported total for current financing debt. Lease liabilities are presented separately ('Lease liability' / lease maturity rows), so 'Current interest-bearing liabilities' is the best non-lease STD proxy and avoids summing components that could double count.

candidates.why: Exact current tax payable/current tax liabilities line.

variables.notes: Direct match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Gross
candidates.why: Gross right-of-use assets are lease-related and not baseline PPE; also not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset line for right-of-use assets, not PPE total/net.
This is the only obvious owned tangible fixed-asset gross line in the balance sheet preview and is more appropriate than right-of-use asset lines for PPE.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist because the shortlist only contains right-of-use asset rows, which are lease-related and not preferred for baseline PPE. 'Fixtures, Tools and Installations - Gross' is the best available PPE label in the provided balance-sheet rows.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.why: Exact net cash flow from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in working capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not the final operating cash flow measure.

variables.notes: Used the final net cash flow from operating activities, not the pre-working-capital subtotal.
